title: Karanga Node
description: Structural envelope for a nodes/<id>.json part (format-v0.1 §6). Type-specific validation (content model, allowed attrs, child rules) is performed by the engine against the type descriptor (§6.3); this schema validates the envelope shape only.

type.description: A base-schema type (bare name) or a namespaced custom type (vendor:name).

content.description: A canonical Karanga Markdown inline string (§7) for inline types, an opaque string for raw types, omitted for empty content — per the type's content model (§6.3).
